settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your app settings and preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Manage your language and display preferences.
preferences.languageHint: Select the language used throughout the application.
preferences.themeHint: Choose a base theme color for your workspace.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose what updates you want to receive.
notifications.marketingDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.securityDesc: Receive emails about your account security.
notifications.updatesDesc: Get notified about system maintenance and updates.

login.signInHint: Please sign in to your account to continue
login.signupLink: Don't have an account? Sign up

signup.title: Create Admin Account
signup.description: Please fill the details to create your account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.successDescription: Check your email for the reset link
forgotPassword.resetLinkSentDesc: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
forgotPassword.helpText: We'll send you a link to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.noEmailHint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or click here to resend

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.chartDescription: Showing total visitors for the last 3 months

users.title: Users
users.editDescription: Make changes to user profile here. Click save when you're done.
users.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user.

admins.title: Admins
admins.editDescription: Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.
admins.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the admin user.

cms.title: CMS Pages
cms.editDescription: Make changes to the CMS page here. Click save when you're done.
cms.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the CMS page.

faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.editDescription: Make changes to the FAQ here. Click save when you're done.
faqs.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the FAQ.

inquiries.title: Inquiries
inquiries.editDescription: Make changes to the inquiry here. Click save when you're done.
inquiries.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the inquiry.
